# meraki_network_vlan_profile_assignment (Data Source)

This data source can read the `Network VLAN Profile Assignment` configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "meraki_network_vlan_profile_assignment" "example" {
  network_id = "L_123456"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `network_id` (String) Network ID

### Read-Only

- `serials` (Set of String) Array of Device Serials
- `stack_ids` (Set of String) Array of Switch Stack IDs
- `vlan_profile_iname` (String) IName of the VLAN Profile
